name: PostNL
summary: Ship with PostNL using your own contract. Print labels straight from ShopLinkr and get tracking directly in your system.
tagline: PostNL is the national postal service of the Netherlands
about: PostNL is the national postal service of the Netherlands. They deliver letters and parcels in the Netherlands and across the rest of the Benelux. PostNL also offers logistics solutions for e-commerce and has a history spanning more than 225 years.

faqs.q: Are address details added to the shipping label automatically?
faqs.a: Yes, we request a shipping label from PostNL based on the shipping details of an order. You can adjust the address details manually if you want.
